title: Troubleshoot irrigation systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Troubleshoot irrigation systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Locate and identify faulty components and blockages

pcs.text: Determine irrigation system and component function
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine irrigation system and component function?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine irrigation system and component function.

pcs.text: Check and review monitoring and maintenance records
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and review monitoring and maintenance records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and review monitoring and maintenance records.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Carry out operational tests on components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out operational tests on components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out operational tests on components.

pcs.text: Identify and document faulty components and blockages

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document faulty components and blockages.
